g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Valkyrja HTTP entry point')
sendPrompt('What happens during App::start in Valkyrja?')
sendPrompt('How does the Valkyrja data cache work?')
sendPrompt('What does the Valkyrja data cache class contain?')
sendPrompt('How does Valkyrja iterate providers to build the service map?')
sendPrompt('How does Valkyrja build a ServerRequest from PHP globals?')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about RequestReceived middleware in Valkyrja')
sendPrompt('How does route matching work in Valkyrja?')
sendPrompt('What happens when no route is matched in Valkyrja?')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about RouteNotMatched middleware in Valkyrja')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about RouteMatched middleware in Valkyrja')
sendPrompt('How does the Valkyrja Dispatcher invoke route handlers?')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about RouteDispatched middleware in Valkyrja')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about ThrowableCaught middleware in Valkyrja')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about SendingResponse middleware in Valkyrja')
sendPrompt('How does Valkyrja write the HTTP response to the output buffer?')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about Terminated middleware in Valkyrja')
